name: Accursed Caress
outcome: Wreathed in eerie dark light, [AttackerName]'s myriad of slender long-nailed hands smoothly close in on you, gently caressing and massaging you all over with magically amplified teasing touches that send tingly shivers across your skin as their fingertips trace dark symbols over the exposed parts of your body.
miss: Wreathed in eerie dark light, [AttackerName]'s myriad of slender long-nailed hands smoothly close in on you, but you manage to escape their flailing reach!
statusOutcome: The dark curse seeps into [TargetName]'s body, the sudden, warm aching feeling of amplified sensitivity coursing through [TargetHimOrHer] making [TargetHimOrHer] shiver and gasp, the slightest gust of air feeling like a enticing caress!
